Device security out of the box

With Microsoft's industry-leading security features built right in, Surface devices protect you and your data anywhere you work.

  1. Microsoft

Surface security

Chip-to-cloud security
  • Chip-to-cloud security
  • Windows security
  • Supply chain
  • IT control
  • Device management

Security from chip-to-cloud

Surface provides world-class, chip-to-cloud security across the multiple layers of hardware, firmware, software, application, cloud, and identity.

Hardware

Easily encrypt and protect your data in a sandboxed environment that stores passwords, PIN numbers, and certificates with Trusted Platform Module 2.0. (TPM 2.0)

Firmware

Automated updates to Microsoft firmware make start up faster and more secure, while DFCI enables remote management of hardware components. (camera, Bluetooth)

Operating system

With advanced Windows OS security features enabled by default, you're proactively protected from threats.

Cloud

Get peace of mind with always-on security features to keep data, devices, and identities more secure than ever.

Be secure and reduce costs

  • 23% lower third-party support and security costs

    Firms saved costs by decommissioning or rolling back their use of third-party security solutions.1

  • 34% fewer security incidents

    Firms reduced the number of security breaches they experienced annually for Surface device users.1

  • 30% less time lost to security incidents

    Maximize your employees’ time by reducing security incident resolution time.1

Enable powerful Windows security with Surface

Pause
Previous Next

Secure booting

Surface’s UEFI2 Secure Boot technology helps prevent malware from running when your Surface computer boots.

Built-in safeguards straight from the factory

Virtualized-based security provides protection against malware by performing isolated security operations.

Password-less security

Secure, Windows Hello uses facial recognition as an additional security layer for sign-in authentication.

Built with supply chain security in mind

Save time and money when you manage your devices with Microsoft3 and Surface.

  • Minimized assembly risk

    We manufacture Surface devices in facilities adhering to the most protective digital and physical security standards.

  • Continuous security monitoring

    We continuously evaluate and manage security in our critical supplier base by publishing and auditing requirements to minimize supply chain risk.

  • Security-focused logistics and distribution

    We actively track and manage our shipments from point of origin to Microsoft resellers and distributors.

Enable more control for IT

Every layer of Surface is maintained by Microsoft, giving you ultimate control, proactive protection, and peace of mind wherever and however work gets done.

Firmware Updates

With Windows Update for Business, keep your devices up-to-date and protected, right down to the firmware level.

Get more control

DFCI4 provides control for IT to enable and disable essential hardware components (camera, Bluetooth) at hyper-secure locations for advanced protection.

Centrally manage Surface devices

Realize greater efficiency and help reduce IT costs through the Microsoft Surface Management Portal.

Manage seamlessly with Endpoint Manager

Deploy and manage down to the firmware layer through the cloud with Microsoft Endpoint Manager and DFCI.

Reduce security risks

Surface customers save time and money with reliable, always-on security.

  • How device choice can make or break your cyber resilience plan

    Device choice is a foundational element of protecting against, detecting, and recovering from cyber-attacks.

    Download the eBook

  • Evaluating the business case of Microsoft Surface

    Surface unlocks new possibilities for employees to get everyday work done faster so they can focus on the bigger picture. They also empower IT to find new time and cost savings to advance digital innovation.

    Learn more

  • Surface Total Cost of Ownership Calculator

    Investing in Microsoft Surface and Microsoft 365 can help you save by simplifying your IT operations, reducing security risks and increasing employee productivity over 3 years.

    Explore here

Explore secure device management

Dive deeper into flexible modern device management solutions for your business.

Device management

Maximize the value of your investments with post-sales support, repairability, and warranty and protection plans.
Explore remote management

  • Designed for the modern workplace

    The Surface for Business portfolio delivers experiences employees love with the choice and flexibility they need to work on their terms.

    Where to buy Compare devices
  • New

    Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,949.49

    Fast, workday-ready performance powered by the next-gen Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3), with built-in AI and optional 5G for productivity anywhere.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen with optional OLED
    • Optional 5G connectivity
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Pro
  • New

    Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,949.99

    Reliable Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) performance with on-device AI, plus an integrated privacy screen on select models for added security.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Integrated privacy screen on select models
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Laptop
  • New

    Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,499.99

    Powerful AI productivity in a lightweight laptop with the latest Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) performance.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 12-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,199.99

    The ultra-portable, powerful, and flexible 2-in-1 PC designed for lightning-fast performance and enhanced AI experiences.

    • Snapdragon® X Plus processor
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 12-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,299.99

    Powerful, intelligent, and ultra-portable laptop designed for enhanced AI experiences and fast performance.

    • Snapdragon® X Plus processor
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 13-inch (11th Ed.) | Intel

    Starting at $1,699.99

    The versatile 2-in-1 PC designed to boost productivity with exceptional performance and powerful AI capabilities.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 2)
    • AI-enhanced communication
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Long battery life
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13.8 and 15-inch (7th Ed.) | Intel

    Starting at $1,699.99

    Built for business, with powerful AI capabilities, exceptional performance and long battery life.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 2)
    • Powerful NPU to drive PC experiences
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Optional 5G connectivity on 13.8-inch
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 13-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,449.99

    The flexible 2-in-1 PC designed for enhanced AI experiences, with industry leading AI acceleration to unlock powerful new features.

    • Snapdragon® X Elite and Plus processors
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Optional 5G connectivity
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13.8 and 15-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,449.99

    Ultra-thin laptop designed for enhanced AI experiences, with industry leading AI acceleration to unlock powerful new features.

    • Snapdragon® X Elite and Plus processors
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Studio 2+

    Starting at $4,499.99

    Find fuel for inspiration on a sleek, versatile all-in-one device that commands attention.

    • 28-inch touchscreen display
    • 11th Gen Intel® Core™ H-35 Processor
    • NVIDIA® GeForce RTX 3060 dGPU
    Meet Surface Studio 2+

  • Surface Hub 3

    An all-in-one digital whiteboard, meetings platform, and collaborative computing device.

    • 50-inch display for smaller spaces
    • 85-inch display for larger rooms
    Meet Surface Hub 3

  • [1] IDC Research Study conducted from surveys and interviews between December 2021 – February 2022. All respondents were IT decision-makers at large organizations (250-5000+ employees) representing organizations from the United States, Australia, India, Spain, France, United Kingdom, New Zealand, and Germany. Cost & Savings findings based on average cost and time estimates provided directly by respondents; actual costs and savings may vary based on your specific Device Mix and deployment. For the actual case study, click here.
  • [2] Unified Extensible Firmware Interface.
  • [3] Software license required for some features. Sold separately.
  • [4] Device Firmware Configuration Interface.
